sections.heading: 2. Part II oft he First Schedule to the Act is amended­ Amendment
sections.text:
First
(a) in paragraph 1- Schedule
(i) by the deletion in item (b) ofsub-paragrah (I) oft he
word " fees ",·
(ii) by the insertion, immediately after sub-paragrapli (2),
oft he following new sub-paragraph:
(3) An amount payable as a fee, fine or other
charge under this Act shall form part oft he general
revenues oft he Republic; and
(iii) by the re-numbering ofs ub-paragraphs (3) and (4 ) as
(4) and (5) respectively; and
(b) in paragraph 2, by the deletion oft he date" 31st March"
and the substitution therefor oft he date" 31 st December"
C. YALUMA,
LUSAKA Minister of Transport, Works
28thJanuary, 2013 Supply and Communications
[MFB.103/17/30 ]
Copies oft his Statutory Instrument can be obtained/ram the Governmetit Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price Kl.00 each
